nodes.context: Primarily Mexican American criminal street and prison gang located in Fresno, California. One of the biggest drug gangs in Central California.
A large Hispanic prison gang in California, rival of Fresno Bulldogs.

edges.evidence_quote: In 1986 the F-14ers went to war with the Norteños, which led to a violent war in the California prison system known in gang folklore as "The Red Wave".
edges.context: Fresno Bulldogs (then F-14ers) went to war with Norteños in 1986.
